rationale: Frontend package-lock.json dependency bumps: i18next-http-backend 3.0.2 to 3.0.5, cross-fetch 4.0.0 to 4.1.0, engine.io-client 6.6.4 to 6.6.5, nanoid 3.3.11 to 3.3.12, postcss 8.5.6 to 8.5.15, protobufjs 7.5.6 to 7.6.0, ws 8.19.0 to 8.20.1, plus a corresponding package.json bump for i18next-http-backend. All patch/minor version bumps, no source changes. Routine lockfile maintenance.
